overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior running along a sunlit beach toward a shipyard. The character traverses sandy shores, rocky outcrops, and bamboo docks before boarding a large wooden vessel. The scene features bright blue skies, detailed traditional Japanese architecture, and cinematic third-person camera work.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with distant wooden ships

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior running steadily along the shoreline toward distant ships on the horizon

entered.detail: calm blue ocean waves lapping against the shore
golden sand stretching along the coastline
traditional Japanese wooden vessel with tall masts anchored offshore
large boulders and rocky formations lining the right side of the beach
tall wooden ship masts visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs along a wide, sunlit beach with the ocean to the left and rocky outcrops to the right. In the distance, large wooden ships with tall masts are anchored near the shore. The environment is open and exposed with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shipyard entrance with scattered cargo

events.description: entering shipyard area marked by rocky outcrops and supply bags on the sand

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow passage between large rocks while approaching the shipyard

entered.detail: brown canvas sacks scattered on the sand containing supplies
temporary wooden barricade and fencing marking the shipyard boundary
wooden boxes and containers stacked near the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more enclosed shipyard area marked by large rocky formations and scattered cargo bags. The space becomes semi-covered by rock walls on both sides. Supply crates and wooden fencing appear as the character moves deeper into the dock area, with the large wooden ship now much closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock area with bamboo rafts and wooden supplies

events.description: approaching bamboo rafts and wooden dock structures scattered across the sand

agents.ego_description: running through the supply area toward the water's edge where bamboo rafts are stacked

entered.detail: bundles of bamboo poles tied together and laid on the sand for construction
red and brown wooden supply crates stacked near the dock

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a cluttered dock area filled with bamboo rafts, wooden crates, and supply barrels. The large wooden ship dominates the view ahead, with its hull and masts filling the center of the frame. The ground remains sandy but is covered with construction materials and dock supplies.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo walkways between ships leading to main vessel

events.description: stepping onto bamboo walkways suspended over water between docked ships
ascending bamboo ramp onto the main wooden ship deck

agents.ego_description: carefully running across bamboo walkways over water and climbing onto the ship's deck

entered.detail: narrow bridge made of bamboo poles and rope suspended over the water
tall wooden mast with rigging rising from the ship's deck
weathered wooden planks of the ship's main deck

segments.scene_description: The character crosses narrow bamboo walkways suspended over the water between docked vessels. The environment becomes enclosed by the wooden hulls of ships on both sides. After ascending a bamboo ramp, the character reaches the wooden deck of the main ship, with tall masts and rigging visible against the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, sunlit beach into the enclosed, cluttered interior of a bustling shipyard. It begins with the samurai running along a wide sandy shore flanked by the ocean and rocky outcrops, with large wooden ships anchored in the distance under a clear blue sky. As the character advances, the open landscape narrows into a semi-covered shipyard area where rock walls, supply crates, and cargo bags begin to hem in the path. The scene then shifts into a dense dock area filled with bamboo rafts and barrels, with the massive hull of a ship gradually dominating the frame. Finally, the camera follows the character across narrow bamboo walkways suspended over the water before ascending a ramp onto the wooden deck of the main vessel beneath its towering masts.
